recommendations.title: Puppetmaster
recommendations.overview: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

recommendations.title: Tourist Trap
recommendations.overview: After their car breaks down, a group of young travelers find themselves stranded at a roadside museum run by the enigmatic Mr. Slausen and populated by his collection of life-like wax mannequins.

recommendations.title: Summer's Blood
recommendations.overview: A demented handyman comes to the rescue of a young woman, then imprisons her in his basement.

recommendations.title: Vile
recommendations.overview: A group of people awaken to find themselves prisoners in a mysterious house with no means of escape. They are each outfitted with electronic devices attached to the base of their skulls. The chemicals that the brain produces when in pain are collecte

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.

recommendations.title: Late Night with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A live broadcast of a late-night talk show in 1977 goes horribly wrong, unleashing evil into the nation's living rooms.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: Murder by Death
recommendations.overview: Lionel Twain invites the world's five greatest detectives to a 'dinner and murder'. Included are a blind butler, a deaf-mute maid, screams, spinning rooms, secret passages, false identities and more plot turns and twists than are decently allowed.

recommendations.title: Inferno
recommendations.overview: A young man returns from Rome to his sister's satanic New York apartment house.

recommendations.title: Bad Samaritan
recommendations.overview: A thief makes a disturbing discovery in the house where he breaks in. Later, when he returns to the same house with his partner in crime, things are no longer how he expected.
